headline: Cigna Group AGM Highlights $275B Revenue, CEO Transition, and Vote Defeat on Written Consent Proposal
summary: The Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) used its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders to highlight 2025 financial results, recent portfolio actions, and initiatives the company says are aimed at improving healthcare affordability.
